column1: # Input sizes n: from 100 to 10000 inclusive
# Units: all timing columns are nanoseconds (ns)
#   size_n — number of keys inserted / searched / deleted in that row
#   insert_batch_ns — one timer around all put() calls on an empty map
#   insert_single_calls_sum_ns — sum of per-put timers on a separate empty map
#   search_successful_ns — get() for each key in random order (all exist)
#   search_unsuccessful_ns — get() for keys guaranteed absent from the map
#   inorder_traversal_ns — iterate entrySet() once (sorted key order)
#   delete_all_ns — remove() each key in random order until empty
# Row order: every row for treap (all n × patterns)
# then every row for java.util.TreeMap. Same keys per (size_n
